message:
fix(mvcc): use strict open-interval bounds in BOCPD and conformal martingale sanitizers

Replace Range::contains checks with explicit > 0.0 && < 1.0 comparisons
so that exact-zero inputs are rejected rather than silently accepted,
matching the documented requirement that hazard, threshold, alpha, and
lambda parameters must be strictly interior to their valid intervals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
